title: Move private methods called only by inner classes to those classes
description: When a private method is only invoked by an inner class, there's no reason not to move it into that class. It will still have the same access to the outer class' members, but the outer class will be clearer and less cluttered.
recommendation: Move private methods to inner classes
impact: Improves code readability and reduces clutter

checks.message: Move private methods to inner classes
